top_signals.title: Germany to deploy Patriot battery to Turkey, relieving US forces on NATO’s southeastern flank
top_signals.summary: Germany’s contribution to intercepting Iranian missiles is framed in Berlin as an exercise in burden-sharing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Minnesota signs law allowing banks, credit unions to offer crypto custody services
top_signals.summary: Governor Tim Walz has signed HF 3709 into law, permitting banks and credit unions to offer crypto custody services.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
